## Summary
I've successfully renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` in the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement_shared.py`:
**Changes made:**
1. **Line 451** (comment): Updated docstring argument description from `ctx: ErkContext with plan_backend access` to `ctx: ErkContext with pr_backend access`
2. **Line 465** (attribute access): Updated code from `ctx.plan_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch(...)` to `ctx.pr_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch(...)`
All renames have been applied to internal code elements (comments and variable/attribute accesses). No external API field names or user-facing string messages were modified, as requested. The verification confirms there are no remaining instances of `plan_backend` or `require_plan_backend` in the file.
